retry_reason: Allocation failure is memory-pressure dependent and not retryable from this wrapper itself; a retry would only be meaningful if the caller reattempts allocation, but that is not part of this function's semantic contract.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is allocation and initialization of a new audit_tree object; refcount_set is one of many initialization steps (string copy, list heads, flags). The function is a constructor, not a dedicated refcount wrapper.
